name: Security - PII Masking in Audit Logs
description: Ensures that sensitive information such as emails, phone numbers, and SSNs in user queries are masked before being logged by the AuditLogger.
input: POST /api/ask with user_input containing an email, phone number, and SSN
output: Audit log entries with all PII replaced by [REDACTED_*] tokens
success_criteria: AuditLogger.log_event is called with masked values
No raw email, phone, or SSN appears in logs
